name: pylon
description: Access Pylon's customer support platform directly from Codex to search, manage, and resolve customer issues.

interface.shortDescription: Access Pylon's customer support platform directly from Codex to search, manage, and resolve customer issues.
interface.longDescription:
Access Pylon's customer support platform directly from Codex to search, manage, and resolve
customer issues. Stay on top of your support queue while connecting Codex's insights to real customer conversations.

You can use the Pylon app to:
  • Check your queue: "What Pylon issues are assigned to me that need a response?"
  • Research customers: "Summarize recent issues from Acme Corp and flag any escalations."
  • Update issues: "Mark the billing issue from Sarah as resolved and add a note that we issued a refund."
defaultPrompt: Can you summarize my most recent issues
